steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals that what follows explains the blank. The phrase they are joined together into a single cohesive unit tells us the elements are linked or connected.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D, interconnected, means joined together, which fits the clue exactly. The other three—informal, optional, outmoded—do not convey that idea and are unrelated to the context. That matches choice D — D is correct.
